hero.imageAlt: Luxurious tropical villa with pool nestled in dense jungle canopy
hero.title: The Art of Stillness
hero.lead: Scroll with us—from our roots in the rainforest to the suite that will hold you, the experiences that will move you, and the quiet that waits at the end.

story.title: A family refuge, grown slowly beneath the canopy
paragraphs: The Sanctuary began as a single lodge and a promise: to let the land lead. Over a decade, what started as a handful of timber-and-glass rooms evolved into a small constellation of pavilions—each one placed so the forest stays in view, and the outside never feels far away.

We work with local makers, seasonal ingredients, and the rhythm of the dry and green seasons. Nothing is rushed. The story we tell guests is the same one we live: respect the place, leave it quieter than you found it, and carry a little stillness home.

suitesBanner.imageAlt: Luxurious tropical villa with pool nestled in dense jungle canopy
suitesBanner.title: Suites & villas
suitesBanner.description: Each room is a private perch—screens instead of walls where we could manage it, and bedding you sink into after a day in the heat and humming air.

suitesCards.title: Canopy Suite
suitesCards.description: Perched above the forest floor—reclaimed teak and glass toward the emerald canopy.
suitesCards.imageAlt: Modern suite with wood balconies on a misty tropical mountainside, dense green forest and soft overcast light

suitesCards.title: Garden Villa
suitesCards.description: A private botanical path, glass walls, and rhythms grounded in earth and jungle.
suitesCards.imageAlt: Exterior view of a two-story tropical garden villa with lush greenery, a private balcony, and a furnished lower patio

suitesCards.title: Treehouse Retreat
suitesCards.description: A multi-level sanctuary among the leaves, suspended above the forest floor.
suitesCards.imageAlt: Elevated wooden treehouse on stilts with balcony and doorway, framed by large tropical leaves and dense forest

bridge.imageAlt: Luxurious tropical villa with pool nestled in dense jungle canopy
bridge.quote: Between your room and the trailhead, the forest teaches its own pace—listen before you plan the day.

yoga.mainImageAlt: Yoga class in an open-air wooden pavilion with ocean cove and jungle hills in the background
yoga.title: Rainforest Yoga
yoga.description: Open-air shala at sunrise over the Guanacaste hills—Vinyasa and Hatha with the jungle as your soundtrack.

items.title: Volcanic Earth Cleanse
items.description: Mineral-rich ash from Arenal, crafted to clarify skin and ground the body after travel.
items.imageAlt: Ceramic bowl with river stones and jasmine petals

items.title: Ancient Sound Bath
items.description: Crystal bowls and percussion to settle the nervous system into deep rest.
items.imageAlt: Incense and bamboo with soft morning light

items.title: Inner Garden Tea Ceremony
items.description: Slow, guided tasting of herbs grown steps from the kitchen—balance for body and breath.
items.imageAlt: Herbal tea poured into a rustic cup

stillness.imageAlt: Luxurious tropical villa with pool nestled in dense jungle canopy
stillness.title: Begin your descent into stillness.
